highlights.title: Live Preview
highlights.description: Write React components, see your video update instantly. No dev server, no build step — the viewer compiles and plays as you code.

highlights.title: Frame-Perfect Animation
highlights.description: Every frame is deterministic. Use interpolate(), spring(), and Sequence to build precise, reproducible motion — no CSS hacks.

highlights.title: Export to Video
highlights.description: Render compositions to MP4 or WebM directly in the browser. Choose format, quality, and download — no command line needed.
